summary: Tested dynamic settings connection for 5 frontend pages. All backend API endpoints work correctly (11/11 tests passed). Frontend pages correctly fetch settings from public API endpoints and display dynamic content. When settings are empty, pages fall back to built-in defaults.

minor.issue: Endpoint does not require authentication - potential security concern for admin settings

context_for_next_testing_agent: Dynamic settings feature is fully functional. 5 frontend pages fetch settings from public API endpoints: TileStationHome.js (TradeCtaBanner), TradeRegisterPage.jsx, CustomerRegisterPage.jsx, TradeAccountPage.jsx, CustomerAccountPage.jsx. Admin saves settings via POST /api/website-admin/trade-account-settings and /api/website-admin/customer-account-settings. Public endpoints return settings without auth. When settings are empty, pages use built-in defaults.
